allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "/ status: $\($r.StatusCode\) len:$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Host "/ => $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Err: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/wizard/1" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "/wizard/1 => $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "/wizard/1 => ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
